sections.paragraph:
Original: פּוּק

Transliteration: pûq

Phonetic: pook

BDB Definition:

  1. to bring out, furnish, promote, go out, issue
    1. (Hiphil)
      1. to produce, furnish
      2. to bring out, elicit, obtain, cause to come out from
      3. to promote
      4. to cause to go out to

Origin: a primitive root [identical with H6328 through the idea of dropping out

TWOT entry: 1748

Part(s) of speech: Verb
